## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Repository Layer

- [ ] Public Trust
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Applied Systems
- [ ] Stewardship / Research
- [ ] Documentation only

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the documented checks or explained why they do not apply.
- [ ] I reviewed public-facing copy for unsupported claims.
- [ ] I updated docs when structure, behavior, commands, or deployment changed.

## Risk

Describe user-facing, security, data, deployment, or maintenance risks.
